🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: The European Central Bank raised interest rates for the first time in three years as BlackRock updated its SEC filing to race Goldman Sachs to market with a Bitcoin Premium Income ETF; simultaneously, ecosystem expansion surged via a $355M funding round for Digital Asset alongside major USDC payout and crypto reward partnerships across MassPay, Uniswap, and OKX. 🤖 European Central Bank raises interest rates for first time in three years The ECB's rate hike signals a shift in monetary policy, potentially impacting risk assets and crypto markets amid ongoing inflation concerns. The post European Central Bank raises interest rates for first time in three years appeared first on Crypto Briefing. Explore more 📈 OKX launches football prediction program with Bitcoin rewards tied to 2026 World Cup OKX's initiative could significantly boost crypto adoption by integrating digital assets with global sports events, enhancing fan engagement. The post OKX launches football prediction program with Bitcoin rewards tied to 2026 World Cup appeared first on Crypto Briefing. More details 🤖 Sen. Rounds emphasizes urgency of AI adoption ahead of Senate hearing The urgency in AI adoption highlights a strategic pivot in US policy, potentially reshaping global power dynamics and economic landscapes. The post Sen. Read more 👛 Uniswap partners with Binance Wallet for $300K USDC rewards program This partnership could significantly enhance DeFi accessibility, potentially increasing user engagement and liquidity in Ethereum-based protocols. The post Uniswap partners with Binance Wallet for $300K USDC rewards program appeared first on Crypto Briefing. More info 📰 MassPay integrates Coinbase payments for instant USDC cross-border payouts MassPay's integration of Coinbase for USDC payouts enhances cross-border transaction efficiency, potentially boosting stablecoin adoption in enterprises. The post MassPay integrates Coinbase payments for instant USDC cross-border payouts appeared first on Crypto Briefing. Learn more 📜 Digital Asset secures $355M funding round led by Andreessen Horowitz The funding highlights the growing convergence of traditional finance and blockchain, potentially reshaping capital markets infrastructure. The post Digital Asset secures $355M funding round led by Andreessen Horowitz appeared first on C

74383.subject: Ukrainian strikes are inflicting pain deep inside Russia
74383.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDR9AAcAAAAAApIvEMBklZ3fryhtY6_LelJoMNJ-_RGuYUFqDuVQeIbvQihLo2aIomIbqQ4J1jbUdOuJjZ9GJrU1SPAMgEW152TjRxNjcYKt8zQF6NjEw6WfJA 

June 11th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist Today

 Our best journalism, handpicked each day


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDR9AAcAAAAAApIvEMBlpC1kEJbwvGSj0c76h_xOCxuXTyRQB3GwGqINI2ybTxOlaTExx-T8Bn8EM-KsXJVG_98AKWwkUAUQUwrhqovf-H7d6_6zUc92wLfgWQ 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDR9AAcAAAAAApIvEMBmpxKBfsHJ9gIcp2dOAZYSmUINkUfAX8Vu3PDkYELPAq2TVc684zEiWJfuepwkIrZe1swWO5GHQL2wqWNGwZFj2grLJFvMT6SeaNtGdQ 



 
 

Bo Franklin

Senior digital editor



Smoke billowing over St Petersburg, as it did last week after a Ukrainian drone strike, brings Vladimir Putin’s war close to home for Russians. But such images fail to capture the scale of these attacks. Our interactive team has modelled 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDR9AAcAAAAAApIvEMBnSBzz6X7WRYKE9PJf3EvWNwnbc527eA5XqA3f_5fhJk2W-VqD9PY8A-rqkhBILLB0525wkGCYV2_R3eYljWcFbMk3knk-Jl4i 
thousands of strikes inside Russia  to gauge their power.


If Elon Musk’s big IPO goes to plan, he may soon be the world’s first dollar trillionaire. Why would anyone want that? Better to be a 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5MDR9AAcAAAAAApIvEMBow8z1Z9Ca5nYn_wNIccrpc1GKfI3s9yZ4gilBKScpt-eezHAh

74375.subject: 🇺🇦 Ваш грошовий переказ не було доставлено
74375.body:
PS Ваш переказ не був
доставлений і Paysend здійснив повернення коштів        Вітаємо,
Oleh,

Повідомляємо, що ваш нещодавній переказ не був доставлений.
Платіж було повернено на ваш початковий спосіб оплати. Обробка
повернення коштів банком може зайняти до трьох днів. Деталі
транзакції:

* Номер транзакції: 21429828200

* Сума: 100
EUR

Можливі причини проблем з переказом:

* Неправильні дані одержувача: Переконайтеся, що дані одержувача
правильні
* Потрібна додаткова інформація: Нам може знадобитися більше
інформації від вас для обробки переказу
* Перевищено ліміти: Перевірте, що ви не перевищили ліміти
переказу, встановлені Paysend або банком одержувача
* Тимчасові проблеми: Можливі тимчасові проблеми з банком або
мережею одержувача
* Відмова банком одержувача: Банк одержувача міг відхилити кошти
з власних причин
Рекомендовані дії:

* Перевірте дані вашого одержувача
* Зверніть увагу на повідомлення від Paysend з проханням надати
додаткову інформацію
* Переконайтеся, що ви не перевищили ліміти переказу Paysend
* Перевірте, що у вас стабільне інтернет-з’єднання
* Ознайомтесь з будь-якими повідомленнями про помилки в
інтерфейсі Paysend і дійте згідно з наданими інструкціями
Будь ласка, виконайте наведені вище рекомендовані дії і
повторіть ваш переказ.

74371.subject: Crypto Biz: SpaceX fuels tokenization’s next boom
74371.body:
Crypto Biz Newsletter

Автор: Cointelegraph


Автор: Cointelegraph

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/crypto-biz-spacex-fuels-tokenizations-next-boom-cointelegraph-vgh6c?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B36IsO9YxRY2lvjy8S3J7dQ%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=25JWBt_sOd-Ig1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mq9jejsr~fd-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mq9jejsr-fd
  
Crypto prices have spent much of the year reacting to macro headlines and regulatory uncertainty, but tokenization has remained one of the industry’s few consistent growth stories. Active real-world assets are surging, banks are embracing blockchain infrastructure and tokenized equities are expanding into new markets. That momentum was on full display this week as Kraken rolled out tokenized access to the highly anticipated SpaceX IPO, offering eligible users in more than 110 markets a chance to participate through xStocks. Elsewhere, prediction markets surpassed onchain gambling for the first time, and former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried formally asked US President Donald Trump for a pardon. Tokenized RWAs keep growing through crypto downturn Tokenized RWAs continue to gain traction despite a weaker crypto market. According to Binance Research, the market for active tokenized RWAs has surged 589% since early 2025, with bonds and money market funds adding $6.5 billion in value while tokenized stocks jumped 422%. The sector is also becoming more diversified. Platforms such as Ondo Global Markets have fueled demand for tokenized equities, while tokenized precious metals gained $1.5 billion as investors sought safe-haven assets earlier this year.  At the same time, traditional financial institutions are expanding their blockchain initiatives, from Apex Group’s tokenized fund services to The Clearing House’s planned tokenized deposit network, highlighting growing adoption beyond crypto-native companies. RWA growth by asset. Source: Binance Research Continue Reading… SpaceX IPO gets tokenized Crypto exchange Kraken gave eligible users in more than 110 markets access to the SpaceX IPO through xStocks, allowing investors to purchase tokenized shares of Elon Musk’s aerospace company ahead of its public debut.  According to Kraken, investors who received an allocation will be issued SPCXx, a tokenized representation backed 1:1 by the underlying equity and tradable 24/7 across participating platforms. The launch comes as demand for tokenized equities continues to accelerate. SpaceX targeted a $75 billion raise in its Nasdaq debut, with the offering reportedly oversubscribed by roughly four times ahead of public trading, putting it on track to become the largest IPO in history. Continue Reading… Prediction markets surpass onchain gambling

74347.subject: cenová ponuka
74347.body:
Dobrý deň Vám prajem, 

na základe nášho stretnutia Vám posielam spracovanú cenovú ponuku.

Cenová ponuka je orientačná a nezáväzná, čokoľvek sa môže zmeniť, upraviť, pridať, ubrať. Výsledná suma vždy závisí od konkrétnych predstáv a požiadavok klienta, od druhu a množstva použitých živých a všetkých ostatných materiálov. 

Štandardne pracujeme tak, že takto dopredu pred svadbou pripravujem ponuku, ktorá je orientačná. Ťažko dopredu určiť presnú sumu a takisto ani Vy nemusíte ešte teraz presne vedieť koľko príde nakoniec hostí, ako sa bude sedieť, koľko stolov budete potrebovať, ako sa môžu zmeniť Vaše predstavy. :-)
Zhruba dva týždne pred svadbou, ako som už spomínala, prípadne podľa potreby skôr sa pripraví predbežná kalkulácia, ktorá sa vyrátava už na základe reálnych počtov položiek a požiadavok a v neposlednom rade počtu hostí.
Všetko je to v prvom rade o komunikácii. Snažím sa jednať s ľuďmi fér, seriózne a k práci pristupovať zodpovedne.
Myslím, že sa dá na mňa v čomkoľvek obrátiť a spoľahnúť. 

Kľudne si ponuku preštudujte a ak by ste mali akékoľvek otázky, chceli sa na čokoľvek opýtať, ak by ste chceli niečo zmeniť, pridať, ubrať, prípadne nastaviť si výšku budgetu kľudne sa na mňa obráťte, rada Vám odpoviem, pomôžem, poradím. 
Všetko som pripravila tak, aby to bolo čo najjednoduchšie pochopiteľné. Ak by bolo čokoľvek nejasné, pýtajte sa.

Ak som na niečo zabudla kľudne ma doplňte. 😉

Budem čakať za Vašou spätnou väzbou.

Prajem krásny deň.



S pozdravom / Best regards

Bc. Lucia Ortutová
Event manager/wedding coordinator

+421 907 382 402
www.dekoracnyservis.sk
info@dekoracnyservis.sk
